---
title: "Setup: Build and run project locally"
labels: setup, required
---

**Project setup — required.**

This issue tracks building and launching the Spring Boot application locally.

### Tasks
- [ ] Build the project using the Maven wrapper.
- [ ] Start the Spring Boot application.
- [ ] Confirm the app listens on port `8080`.
- [ ] Confirm that `http://localhost:8080` responds.

### Done when
- The application builds and starts successfully with the API reachable on `localhost:8080`.
